title: DevOps Engineer (AWS / Kubernetes)
description:
Vertex Cloud Systems is hiring a DevOps Engineer to evolve our cloud infrastructure on AWS. You'll own the Kubernetes platform our product teams ship on, run CI/CD across dozens of services, and enforce infrastructure-as-code as our default delivery mechanism.

Responsibilities:
- Manage AWS infrastructure (EKS, EC2, RDS, S3, IAM, CloudWatch).
- Operate production Kubernetes clusters; manage Helm charts and Argo CD deployments.
- Author and maintain Terraform modules covering networking, IAM, and managed services.
- Build CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and Jenkins; enforce trunk-based delivery.
- Containerize applications with Docker; define multi-stage builds.
- Implement observability (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki) and SLO-driven alerting.
- Coach product engineers on incident response, on-call hygiene, and runbook quality.

Must-have skills:
- 4+ years operating production cloud infrastructure on AWS.
- Kubernetes administration experience (EKS preferred).
- Terraform fluency for IaC.
- Strong Bash and at least one of Python or Go.
- Docker and container best practices.
- CI/CD pipeline ownership (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or GitLab CI).
- Linux systems experience.

Nice to have:
- Argo CD or Flux GitOps experience.
- Helm chart authoring.
- Service mesh (Istio, Linkerd) exposure.
- Prometheus / Grafana observability stack.
- Vault or AWS Secrets Manager background.
